title: PhyloRNA: A Database of RNA Secondary Structures with Associated Phylogeny (DOI Reference)
author: Quadrini, Michela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This entry provides a DOI for  PhyloRNA , a curated meta-database of RNA secondary structures linked with phylogenetic information. 
 PhyloRNA contains a collection of known RNA secondary structures, either extracted from public databases or derived from 3D structural data. Each structure is annotated with multiple features - such as pseudoknot presence, base-pairing statistics, and structural abstractions - and is associated with taxonomic data from five curated phylogenies. 
 The database is intended to support evolutionary analyses of RNA structure across organisms, offering a platform where structural and phylogenetic information are integrated. 
  Access PhyloRNA :  https://bdslab.unicam.it/phylorna/  
 This DOI can be used to cite the PhyloRNA database in publications. It is associated with the manuscript: 
 Quadrini, M. & Tesei, L.  PhyloRNA: A Database of RNA Secondary Structures with Associated Phylogeny , submitted (2025). 
 We plan to update this entry as the database evolves and as the manuscript progresses through peer review. 
 Funding 
 This work was supported by the European Union - NextGenerationEU - National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP), Mission 4, Component 2, Investment 1.1, under the PRIN 2022 PNRR call (Min. Decree No. 1409, dated September 14, 2022), project: P2022FFEWN RNA secondary structures and their relationship with function: application to non-coding RNAs (RNA2Fun), CUP: J53D23014960001.
